summary: Iteration 237 — Pacchetti Documentali D4+D5 Testing Complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All D4+D5 features verified including PackageDetailView, email preview, recipient form, send confirmation dialog, and send history.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test session from iteration_235: session token BccyJvnOyrPXRRYy4GfxR5osuF51RWcYWWnUUoHx434, user_id user_6988e9b9316c
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pacchetti Documentali D1-D5 fully working. D4+D5 features verified: (1) POST /api/pacchetti-documentali/{id}/prepara-invio generates email draft with subject, body, attachments list, and warnings for missing/expired docs. (2) POST /api/pacchetti-documentali/{id}/invia sends email via Resend (or returns graceful error if not configured) and logs send to pacchetti_invii collection. (3) GET /api/pacchetti-documentali/{id}/invii returns send history. (4) PATCH /api/pacchetti-documentali/{id} updates recipient and label fields. Frontend PackageDetailView shows checklist, email form with To/CC inputs, Prepara Invio button, email subject/body after prepare, warnings box, Invia Email button with confirmation dialog, and send history section.
